title: Eria abbreviata
taxonomy: Eria abbreviata is classified as a species of orchid, belonging to the family Orchidaceae. It is a type of epiphytic orchid, which means it grows on other plants, typically trees, for support. The Orchidaceae family is one of the largest and most diverse plant families in the world, with over 30,000 known species. Within the Orchidaceae family, Eria abbreviata is further classified as a member of the subtribe Coeliinae, which includes about 150 species of orchids. Eria abbreviata is native to certain regions in Southeast Asia, where it can be found growing in the wild.
